evals.prompt: I'm about to build the send-money wizard for the bank app — the one that handles SEPA and SWIFT with FX. What does it need to get right before I start?
evals.expected_output: Invokes the payments domain expert; gives requirements + guardrails (rail truth, fee/FX disclosure before confirm, SCA/step-up, confirmation of payee, pending vs settled), cites the P03 spec and the money spine, hands off to gok-bank-ux.

evals.prompt: Add a standing order feature so people can pay rent every month. How should it work?
evals.expected_output: Invokes the payments expert; distinguishes standing order (push) from direct debit (pull/mandate), covers frequency/start/end, projected-balance check, cancel as forced-decision, next-run preview; scopes correctly.

evals.prompt: Should we let users send crypto from the payments screen, and also support Swedish Swish payments?
evals.expected_output: Invokes the payments expert; pushes back on scope — crypto belongs to gok-bank-wealth, Swish is out (pan-European = SEPA + SWIFT); explains the why and the in-scope alternative.
